title: Visual
description: Vanilla Minecraft, but beautifully designed. As smoothly as possible, in a natural way and without losing the original atmosphere.
body:
# 🧱 Visual

## ✨ Short Description
A beautiful, smooth, and optimized visual overhaul for Vanilla Minecraft. Clean, atmospheric, and performance-friendly.

---

## 🪞 Full Description
**Minecraft Visual** is a modpack that enhances Minecraft's visuals while keeping its pure vanilla charm.  
It focuses on realistic lighting, ambient effects, smoother animations, and immersive sounds —  
all designed to make the game look naturally stunning without breaking its original style or lowering performance.
Built for players who love a peaceful, beautiful, and optimized Minecraft experience.

---

## 🌿 Main Features
- 💨 **Realistic Environment:** improved clouds, fog, water, and atmosphere.  
- 🌇 **Enhanced Visuals:** soft lighting, ambient particles, reflections, and weather.  
- 👁️ **Better Animations:** Fresh Animations and subtle effects make everything feel alive.  
- ⚙️ **Performance Ready:** Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, and Dynamic FPS for smooth gameplay.  
- 🧩 **Smart Tools & Quality of Life:** quick swapping, visual measuring, and fluid block placement.  
- 🎨 **Shader Support:** works perfectly with Iris, Continuity, and LambDynamicLights.  
- 🎧 **Immersive Audio:** Sound Physics Remastered and Presence Footsteps add depth and realism.  

---

## 📦 Included Mods

### 🔹 Core Visual & Performance Mods
- **Ambient Sounds Fabric** — immersive environmental audio
- **Better Biome Blend** — smoother biome transitions
- **Better Clouds** — enhanced cloud rendering
- **Better Snowy Biome** — improved snow visuals
- **Blur Fabric** — background blur effects
- **Bobby** — extended render distance
- **Cherished Worlds** — favorite worlds management
- **Chunky Fabric** — world pre-generation
- **ClickThrough Plus** — interact through transparent GUIs
- **Cloth Config** — mod configuration library
- **Clumps** — optimized XP orb collection
- **CreativeCore & Ambient Sounds** — core library for audio mods
- **CWB Fabric** — custom window bar
- **Dynamic FPS** — reduces FPS when minimized
- **Effectual Fabric** — visual status effects
- **Entity Culling** — performance optimization
- **Entity Model & Texture Features** — improved entity rendering
- **Explosive Enhancement** — better explosion effects
- **Fabric API** — core mod loader library
- **Fabric Language Kotlin** — Kotlin support for Fabric
- **FerriteCore** — memory optimization
- **ForgeConfigAPIPort** — config compatibility layer
- **Fzzy Config** — configuration utility

### 🔹 Graphics & Lighting
- **ImmediatelyFast Fabric** — rendering optimizations
- **Immersive Storms** — enhanced weather effects
- **Iris** — shader support
- **Jade** — advanced tooltip information
- **LambDynamicLights** — dynamic lighting system
- **Language Reload** — language switching improvements
- **MassEffects** — particle effects
- **MidnightLib** — utility library
- **Mod Menu** — mod management interface
- **Mouse Tweaks** — inventory quality of life
- **MRU (edges)** — rendering utility
- **Nethermap** — Nether navigation
- **Not Enough Animations** — enhanced player animations
- **OwO Lib** — UI library
- **ParticleEffects** — additional particle systems
- **Particlerain** — rain particle improvements
- **Particular** — particle customization
- **Presence Footsteps** — realistic footstep sounds
- **PuzzlesLib** — library mod
- **Reese's Sodium Options** — Sodium configuration GUI

### 🔹 Performance & Optimization
- **Shoulder Surfing Fabric** — third-person camera improvements
- **Skinlayers 3D** — 3D player skin layers
- **Sodium Extra** — additional Sodium features
- **Sodium Fabric** — rendering engine optimization
- **Sound Physics Remastered** — realistic sound propagation
- **Sounds** — sound improvements
- **Spyglass Astronomy** — enhanced spyglass features
- **Status Effect Bars** — visual effect timers
- **SubtleEffects** — subtle visual improvements
- **TFLB Fabric** — library mod

### 🔹 Utility & QoL Mods
- **VectorOrientation** — directional placement helper
- **Visuality** — visual enhancement
- **VisualWorkbench** — crafting table preview
- **WI Zoom** — zoom functionality
- **Yet Another Config Lib** — configuration library

---

## 🎨 Resource Packs

### Visual Enhancements
- **Animated Items** — animated item textures
- **Effect Icons+ v2.0** — improved status effect icons
- **Enchant Icons** — better enchantment visuals
- **Enchantment Outlines** — enchanted item highlights
- **EnderEyes** — enhanced Ender Pearl/Eye visuals
- **FA+ All Extensions** — Fresh Animations extension pack
- **FA+ Classic Horses** — classic horse animations
- **FA+ Details** — detailed animation additions
- **FA+ Emissive** — emissive textures for animations
- **FA+ Objects** — object animations
- **FA+ Quivers** — quiver animations
- **FA+ Spiders** — spider animations
- **Fancy Crops** — improved crop visuals
- **Fresh Animations** — comprehensive mob animations
- **Low Fire** — reduced fire overlay
- **Low Shield** — less obstructive shield
- **Recolourful Containers 3.1** — colorful chest variants
- **Visual Armor Trims** — visible armor customization

---

## 🎯 Performance Tips
- Use **Sodium** settings to balance graphics and FPS
- Pre-generate chunks with **Chunky** for smoother exploration
- Adjust **Dynamic FPS** settings to save resources when idle
- Configure **Bobby** render distance based on your hardware
- Tweak **Iris** shader settings for optimal performance

---

## 🛠️ Installation
1. Install **Fabric Loader** for Minecraft 1.21.11
2. Download and place all mod files in the `mods` folder
3. Place resource packs in the `resourcepacks` folder
4. Launch the game and activate desired resource packs
5. Configure settings via **Mod Menu** in-game

---

## 💡 Recommended Settings
- Enable **Fresh Animations** and all FA+ packs for best visual experience
- Activate **Sound Physics Remastered** for immersive audio
- Use **Reese's Sodium Options** to fine-tune graphics
- Enable **Presence Footsteps** for realistic movement sounds
- Configure **Shoulder Surfing** camera to your preference

---

## ⚠️ Requirements
- **Minecraft:** 1.21.11
- **Loader:** Fabric
- **RAM:** 4GB minimum, 6-8GB recommended
- **Java:** 17 or higher

---

**Enjoy your beautifully enhanced Minecraft experience!** 🌟
